title: UOBJ.TEXT
text: UOBJ.TEXT The UOBJ.TEXT entity stores runtime counters that can be addressed using the numgen and numset ProcScript statements. The associated table is usually created at runtime. For applications migrated from Uniface 9, UOBJ.TEXT may have been used to define and initialize counter data as part of the application distribution or installation process. In this case, the table itself must be correctly delivered and deployed. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
